features.name: 根目录混合宿主架构：Monorepo /prog 支持
test_steps: 在仓库根目录运行 prog init，确认生成 tracker_role=parent 的 progress.json 并自动发现子插件
在根目录运行 prog，确认面板展示所有子目录完成率和当前活跃 feature
在根目录运行 prog next-feature，确认按 routing_queue 顺序 dispatch 到子目录
运行 prog prioritize PT，确认输出 [OK] PT moved to front 并更新队列
运行 pytest -q plugins/progress-tracker/tests/ 确认回归测试全部通过

out_of_scope: Unrelated refactors and behavior changes outside this feature.
risks: Potential regression in adjacent workflows; verify with listed test_steps.

acceptance_scenarios: Scenario: 在仓库根目录运行 prog init，确认生成 tracker_role=parent 的 progress.json 并自动发现子插件
Scenario: 在根目录运行 prog，确认面板展示所有子目录完成率和当前活跃 feature
Scenario: 在根目录运行 prog next-feature，确认按 routing_queue 顺序 dispatch 到子目录
Scenario: 运行 prog prioritize PT，确认输出 [OK] PT moved to front 并更新队列
Scenario: 运行 pytest -q plugins/progress-tracker/tests/ 确认回归测试全部通过

features.name: Robust Progress State Architecture - Event Sourcing & Reconciliation
test_steps: Configure Git union merge for audit.log via .gitattributes
Define event schema whitelist (feature_completed, feature_undone, state_restored, tracker_reset, manual_state_override)
Implement reconcile-state command with drift detection and auto-ingestion
Add post-merge Git hook that auto-commits reconciled progress.json
Verify Feature 9 state recovery through audit.log replay
Test union merge behavior with concurrent audit.log appends
Validate manual state override events are properly recorded and replayed

change_spec.why: Implement Event Sourcing pattern to prevent progress state loss during Git merges. The current single-file progress.json approach loses completed state when merge conflicts are resolved by picking base branch version. This architecture uses audit.log as the single source of truth with union merge strategy, automatic reconciliation, and full audit trail for all state changes including manual edits.
in_scope: Git union merge configuration for audit.log
Feature 9 immediate repair through automated backfill
out_of_scope: Modifying core business logic of existing commands
Implementing new quality gates or review processes
risks: Union merge edge cases with concurrent appends may require deduplication logic
Event ordering issues if branches append different events simultaneously
Schema evolution needs version field for future compatibility

acceptance_scenarios: Scenario: Git merge of audit.log uses union strategy without conflicts
Scenario: reconcile-state correctly replays events and reconstructs state
Scenario: Manual edits to progress.json are recorded as manual_state_override events
Scenario: Post-merge hook auto-commits reconciled progress.json with [skip ci]
Scenario: Feature 9 state is recovered through audit.log replay after merge
Scenario: Duplicate events are properly deduplicated during reconciliation

defects: I-01: manual_state_override event type whitelisted but no call-site detects/records manual edits to progress.json — acceptance scenario 3 partially unmet
I-02: append_audit_record temp-file pattern provides no atomicity guarantee; code misleadingly suggests atomic rename semantics
I-03: state_restored event type whitelisted but never emitted
S-01: _write_audit_event test helper uses mutable default arg counter=[0]
S-02: deduplicate_audit_log in-memory only; never writes deduped records back to audit.log
S-03: post_merge_hook.sh $? in warn block captures echo exit code not reconcile-state exit code

sprint_contract.scope: Implement Event Sourcing architecture for robust progress state management
done_criteria: Git union merge configured and tested
Event schema whitelist defined and documented
Post-merge Git hook installed and functional
test_plan: Test union merge with concurrent audit.log appends
Implement event schema whitelist in audit_log.py
Run integration tests for reconciliation flow

bugs.description: Python falsy trap: current_feature_id=0 被 not 误判为 None，导致 set-workflow-state/auto_checkpoint/wf_auto_driver/route_status 等函数在 feature ID 为 0 时异常跳过
bugs.root_cause: Python truthy/falsy trap: not 0 == True，导致 ID=0 的 feature 被误判为不存在

investigation.root_cause: Python truthy/falsy trap: not 0 == True，导致 ID=0 的 feature 被误判为不存在
